name: supergraph
description: Graph-driven AI coding workflows with Serena MCP integration. Full dev cycle: scan → analyze → plan → TDD → fix → verify → review. Structured debugging (diagnose), architecture review with HTML reports, PRD generation, issue triage, throwaway prototyping, handoff for context compaction, caveman token-compression mode, and CONTEXT.md cross-skill vocabulary. Supports Node.js, Flutter, PHP, Python, Go, Rust.
